channel.title: Reuters (Direct)
channel.description: Reuters news with direct article URLs, decoded from Google News

item.title: Microsoft reveals new quantum chip made with AI, says it will have systems by 2029 - Reuters
item.description: Microsoft reveals new quantum chip made with AI, says it will have systems by 2029 Reuters
